comment: Grid/e2e companion to hi-iter-direct.json: full-viewport cases for the direct pathway at >25k iterations, prioritizing border-pixel-heavy (high-but-not-max) views. Used with run-grid.mjs / run-e2e.mjs via --corpus.

cases.note: Reported view shifted 4 tiles up: grid is mostly the escaper band (border-pixel-heavy, escapers ~0.7-1.7k mean, occasional ~43k)
The reported URL grid: ~13.5% interior pixels carrying ~90% of the work; anchor case for this regime
Seahorse valley grid: cardioid/bulb interior walls + slow-escape channel, mixed composition
